project.name: Skate Park Sitecore AI
project.type: Sitecore XM Cloud + Next.js App Router

tech_stack.styling: Vanilla CSS Overrides for Sitecore Forms

gotchas: App Router components using AppPlaceholder must handle componentMap carefully to avoid circular loops.
Layout components should be Server Components for better Sitecore Editor chrome rendering.
BasicForm styling requires deep CSS overrides to match custom design systems.
